text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! 🎉 You've been approved as a Moderator. We're thrilled to have you on the team — please check out the mod guidelines and feel free to reach out if you have any questions. Thanks for stepping up!

Welcome, guide_sam! 🎉 Your application has been approved and you've joined us as an Event Helper. We're excited to have you — keep an eye on the events channel for upcoming opportunities to jump in. Welcome aboard!
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! 🎉 You've been approved as a Member. We're glad you're here — feel free to explore, introduce yourself, and don't hesitate to ask if you need anything. Welcome!

Welcome, mentor_lina! 🎉 You've been approved as a Mentor — a role that makes a real difference for newcomers. We're so glad to have your experience and guidance in the community. Check out the mentor resources channel and welcome aboard!
